title: AN ACT CREATING A BARANGAY IN THE CITY OF DASMARINAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE TO BE KNOWN AS BARANGAY SAMPALOC V (NEW ERA)

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, September 6, 2019; 115 OG No. 41, 11268 (October 14, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11405, August 22, 2019 ]

AN ACT CREATING A BARANGAY IN THE CITY OF DASMARINAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE TO BE KNOWN AS BARANGAY SAMPALOC V (NEW ERA)

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Creation of Barangay Sampaloc V (New Era).

- There is hereby created a barangay in the City of Dasmarinas, Province of Cavite to be known as Barangay Sampaloc V (New Era).

SEC. 2.

Territorial boundaries.

- The territorial boundaries of Barangay Sampaloc V (New Era) are described as follows:

SEC. 3.

Conduct and Supervision of Plebiscite.

-The plebiscite conducted and supervised by the Commission on Elections (COMELEC) pursuant to Provincial Ordinance No. 4-S91 of the Sangguniang Panlalawigan of the Province of Cavite, which ratified the creation of Barangay Sampaloc V (New Era) as proclaimed by the Plebiscite Board of Canvassers on August 1, 1993 shall serve as substantial compliance with the requirement under Section 10 of Republic Act No. 7160, otherwise known as the "Local Government Code of 1991", as amended.

SEC. 4.

Incumbent Barangay Officials.

- The incumbent elected barangay officials of Barangay Sampaloc V (New Era) shall continue to hold office until their successors shall have been elected and qualified.

SEC. 5.

Public Infrastructure and Facilities.

-All public infrastructure and facilities existing therein at the time of the approval of this Act are hereby transferred without cost or compensation to and shall be administered by the new Barangay Sampaloc V. (New Era).

SEC. 6.

Internal Revenue Allotment Shares.

-Barangay Sampaloc V (New Era) shall be entitled to internal revenue allotment (IRA) share pursuant to Section 285 of the Local Government Code of 1991, as amended.

SEC. 7.

Effectivity.

- This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the Official gazette or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL ARROYO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on May 20, 2019, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on June 3, 2019, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on June 4, 2019.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 22 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
